continuation_request.label: post-ipc-continuation
continuation_request.purpose: Continue the live loop after inbound IPC acceptance. Carry forward probe_status, open_items, and any durable continuity fields from the completed wake state.

content.inbound_status: Live loop accepted work at cycle 1. Inbound message event 87dd5b9b processed — probe acknowledged readiness and accepted scheduling of a bound continuation.

open_items.text: Process continuation from inbound IPC acceptance — sustain the loop with durable state tracking across wakes.
